name: Boboli Four Cheese White Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified on the Boboli Pizza package.
2. Spread a thin layer of olive oil evenly over the surface of the Boboli dough.
3. Distribute the mozzarella, gorgonzola, sharp provolone, and parmesan cheeses evenly over the dough.
4. If desired, add onion slices and blanched broccoli to the pizza.
5. Bake according to the instructions on the Boboli Pizza package.
6. Turn off the heat when finished baking.
